lessons.title: Classes & Objects
lessons.subtitle: Defining your first class
lessons.task: Print the Point as "3,4" using its x and y fields.

lessons.title: Constructors
lessons.subtitle: Initializing objects
lessons.task: Add a Point(int x, int y) constructor so the program prints 7,2.
lessons.hint: Point(int x, int y) { this.x = x; this.y = y; }

lessons.title: Methods on Classes
lessons.subtitle: Behavior lives with data
lessons.task: Implement distanceFromOrigin() so the program prints 5.

lessons.title: Inheritance
lessons.subtitle: extends and super
lessons.task: Create class Dog extends Animal and override speak() to return "Woof".
lessons.hint: class Dog extends Animal { @Override String speak() { return "Woof"; } }
